executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Auth: POST /api/admin/auth with admin/admin123, expect {ok:true, token, mustChange:true}. Then Bearer token to /admin. Cover /admin, /admin/ml, /admin/ml/train, /admin/ml/monitoring, /admin/ml/backtest, /admin/signals, /admin/signals/backtest, /admin/elo, /admin/calibration, /admin/algorithm.
